description:
You notice a strange man gesturing with his arms and legs at human soldiers вАФ he is a fae. He is hated in the human realm. The humans make fun of him and throw food at him. Azrael has been in a carriage accident and is desperately trying to find help. Will you be his helper or tormentor?
